title: Contribute to production goals
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Contribute to production goals demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify production goals

pcs.text: Workplace procedures relevant to the work area are identified and interpreted1.2 Production indicators and timelines are identified and confirmed

elements.title: Support the achievement of production goals

pcs.text: Work production and quality goals are monitored and variations responded to promptly2.2 Work plans, workplace instructions, job specifications and schedules are applied and followed according to workplace procedures2.3 Changes in work requirements are clarified with supervisor2.4 Work goals are reviewed and continuous improvement recommendations are discussed with team members and supervisors
